news.title: EASE 8.0 Reform Agenda Advances Transformation of Public Sector Banks
news.india_relevance: This is the official roadmap for the next phase of digital and structural reforms across India's public sector banking landscape.
news.why_it_matters: It signals a shift toward data-driven lending and enhanced risk management for PSBs, which control the majority of Indian banking assets.

news.title: Floating Rate Savings Bonds, 2020 (Taxable) - FRSB 2020 (T) - Operational Guidelines
news.india_relevance: Direct official guidelines from the central bank regarding a popular retail investment instrument for Indian citizens.
news.why_it_matters: Clarifies the operational mechanics of government-backed savings instruments in a volatile interest rate environment.

news.title: SEBI proposes reintroducing open market buyback via stock exchange; selling in buyback similar to normal market transactions
news.india_relevance: A major regulatory shift affecting how Indian listed companies return capital to shareholders.
news.why_it_matters: This move could simplify the buyback process for companies while changing the tax and liquidity dynamics for retail investors.

news.title: RBI approves Emirates NBD’s proposal to acquire up to 74% stake in RBL Bank
news.india_relevance: A significant foreign direct investment in the Indian private banking sector involving a major Middle Eastern bank.
news.why_it_matters: Marks a rare instance of a foreign entity being allowed a majority stake in a local bank, signaling potential consolidation or capital infusion needs.

news.title: West Asia crisis impact: Manufacturing PMI drops sharply to near 4-year low of 53.9 in March 2026
news.india_relevance: A critical macro indicator showing how geopolitical tensions are directly cooling India's industrial engine.
news.why_it_matters: The sharp drop suggests that rising input costs and shipping disruptions are finally hitting factory output and sentiment.

news.title: Iran war: India’s Qatar LNG imports crash 93%, triggering supply scramble, price spike
news.india_relevance: India relies heavily on Qatar for gas; this massive disruption threatens energy security and industrial costs.
news.why_it_matters: Forces Indian utilities to buy expensive spot-market gas, which will eventually lead to higher power and fertilizer subsidies or prices.

news.title: India waives customs duty on 40 petrochemical products till June 2026
news.india_relevance: A direct fiscal intervention by the Indian government to protect domestic manufacturers from soaring raw material costs.
news.why_it_matters: Shows the government's urgency in controlling inflation for downstream industries like plastics, textiles, and pharma.

news.title: Trump imposes 100% tariffs on branded drug imports, overhauls metals duties
news.india_relevance: India is the 'pharmacy of the world' and a major exporter of generic and branded drugs to the US market.
news.why_it_matters: Could severely hurt the margins of Indian pharma giants and force a shift toward local US manufacturing or new trade negotiations.

news.title: India agrees to longer WTO e-commerce moratorium, opposes plurilateral push without safeguards
news.india_relevance: Determines whether India can eventually tax digital transmissions like software downloads and streaming services.
news.why_it_matters: Balances the need for tax revenue against the growth of the digital economy and global trade relations.

news.title: Unilever just stepped back from food
